creator: rometravelers
caption:
Rome in summer feels like history wrapped in golden sunlight by @iampcast 🇮🇹✨Send this to your favorite traveling partner! ❤️

💡Rome becomes extremely vibrant in summer, with long sunny days that highlight its ancient architecture like the Colosseum and Pantheon in golden light

transcription.text: I'm in a bad girl good mood, wearing my gold hoops Lining my lips right now in the rear view, baby Don't even play When you look at me like that, in your cowboy hat Talking like a real man, make me wanna take it back, back, back to your place Mmm, turn this car around We ain't going out You're going down smooth like Mexico, honey Take my heart, take all my money I want you so bad it ain't even
